command: source .env.openrouter.local && export PATH="$HOME/.nimble/bin:$PATH" && uv run cogames play -m cogsguard_machina_1 -c 3 -p class=machina_llm_roles,kw.llm_timeout_s=10 -s 80
description: Baseline 3-agent LLM team on cogsguard_machina_1; per-agent reward=0.0135999918

command: source .env.openrouter.local && export PATH="$HOME/.nimble/bin:$PATH" && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run cogames play -m cogsguard_machina_1 -c 3 -p class=machina_llm_roles,kw.llm_timeout_s=10 -s 80 -r log
description: 2-aligner default for 3-cog machina_llm_roles plus planner crash fallback; per-agent reward=0.00799999

command: source .env.openrouter.local && export PATH="$HOME/.nimble/bin:$PATH" && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run cogames play -m cogsguard_machina_1 -c 3 -p class=machina_llm_roles,kw.llm_timeout_s=10 -s 80 -r log
description: Offline planner fallback with 1 aligner 2 miners and miner hub-search override; per-agent reward=0.00799999

command: source .env.openrouter.local && export PATH="$HOME/.nimble/bin:$PATH" && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run cogames play -m cogsguard_machina_1 -c 3 -p class=machina_llm_roles,kw.llm_timeout_s=10 -s 80 -r log --autostart

command: source .env.openrouter.local && export PATH="$HOME/.nimble/bin:$PATH" && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run python - <<'PY' ... class=machina_llm_roles,kw.llm_timeout_s=20 ... max_steps=100 ... render_mode=log ... PY
description: Preserved planner-selected unstuck across gear/goal overrides and stopped transient OpenRouter failures from permanently disabling the planner; 100-step LLM-backed run completed with per-agent reward=0.01659999, cogs/aligned.junction.held=66, cogs/silicon.deposited=80

command: source .env.openrouter.local && export PATH="$HOME/.nimble/bin:$PATH" && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run cogames play -m cogsguard_machina_1 -c 3 -p class=machina_llm_roles,kw.llm_timeout_s=20 -s 1000 -r log --autostart

command: source .env.openrouter.local && export PATH="$HOME/.nimble/bin:$PATH" && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run cogames play -m cogsguard_machina_1 -c 8 -p class=machina_llm_roles,kw.num_aligners=2,kw.llm_timeout_s=20 -s 1000 -r log --autostart
